rationale: Both papers center on automated extraction of product/content attributes from text for marketing tasks: the citing paper introduces guided LDA movie features from text, while the cited paper proposes an automated review-mining pipeline to derive product attributes for market-structure analysis. Given this clear methodological and conceptual overlap in text-based feature construction (a core issue in the citing paper’s stated research gap), this is not an obvious incidental mention and should be retained for full relation judgment.
